top_signals.title: Notorious ‘jaredfromsubway’ MEV bot drained for roughly $7.5 million in counter-MEV honeypot
top_signals.summary: An X account using the bot's name claimed a $15 million loss and offered a $1 million bounty, but evidence shows it is a likely impersonator.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A $2.8 Trillion Asset Management Star Is a Deal Away From Losing Its Crown
top_signals.summary: Amundi became Europe’s largest fund firm with the help of acquisitions. But after years without a major takeover, rivals are catching up.

top_signals.title: The Hormuz Crisis Has Forced India to Rethink Its Energy Strategy
top_signals.summary: India has been battling to secure its energy security in recent months, as its heavy dependence on fossil fuel imports has made it highly vulnerable to a closure of the Strait of Hormuz. Severe energy supply chain disruptions have prompted India to deepen its ties with the United States to secure sufficient liquefied natural gas (LNG) supplies and to reassess its plan to enhance energy security over the coming decades, with consideration of renewable energy expansion. The months-long restrictions on energy trade through the Strait of Hormuz led…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
